notes: YMCA of Greater New York Dodge branch birthday-party page and branch listing. Hero image is the official Dodge indoor pool banner on ymcanyc.org, downloaded and re-hosted via POST /api/ingest/upload.
missingOrUncertain: pricePerClass is 0 because the birthday page uses an inquiry form rather than a published per-party price table; request a quote via the Office form or dodgeparties@ymcanyc.org.
rating and reviewCount are 0; not published on these official pages.
Specific party package options (pool vs gym) and availability are confirmed only after the branch party team responds to an inquiry.

document.name: Dodge YMCA — Birthday Parties
document.shortDescription: Downtown Brooklyn Y birthday rentals with pool and gym party options; families start via the branch inquiry form and dodgeparties@ymcanyc.org.
document.longDescription:
The Dodge YMCA of Greater New York at 225 Atlantic Avenue in Brooklyn advertises hassle-free children’s birthday parties with packages that can include pool parties, gym parties, and related youth-program spaces. The official birthday-party page directs families to complete an inquiry form so the party team can review the requested date and follow up, and lists dodgeparties@ymcanyc.org for questions.

The branch location page describes Dodge as serving the downtown Brooklyn area with pools, youth sports, dance, and other family programs. Party pricing is not listed as a fixed public rate on the birthday page used here; families should use the inquiry workflow for current package details and fees.

Branch phone on the location listing: 212-912-2400.

Sources: https://ymcanyc.org/locations/dodge-ymca/programs-classes/kids-family/birthday-parties https://ymcanyc.org/locations/dodge-ymca
document.announcementTitle: Start with the party inquiry form
document.announcementDescription: Dodge Y birthday bookings begin with the published Office inquiry form—email dodgeparties@ymcanyc.org for help.
